# Tardiff & Saldo Law Offices

## About
Tardiff & Saldo Law Offices (legal entity: Appellate Advocacy Group) is a full-service law firm based in San Luis Obispo, California, serving clients throughout SLO County and the Central Coast. The firm was founded by Tyler Saldo and Dustin Tardiff, both Central Coast natives with over 30 years combined legal experience.

Tagline: "A Different Kind of Law Firm."
Key differentiator: litigation-background attorneys who draft transactional documents (contracts, trusts, and estate plans written by attorneys who have argued them in court).

## Contact
- Address: 1235 Palm St, San Luis Obispo, CA 93401
- Phone: (888) 461-2215
- Email: hello@tardiffsaldo.com
- Hours: Monday through Friday, 9:00am to 5:00pm
- Online booking: https://book.tardiffsaldo.com/widget/bookings/tardiffsaldo

## Practice Areas
- Trusts & Estate Planning: living trusts, wills, powers of attorney, healthcare directives, special needs trusts, guardianship designations. Flat-fee packages. Free consultations.
- Probate: probate administration, trust administration, will contests, executor representation.
- Business Law: formation, contracts, buy-sell agreements, M&A, shareholder disputes, business litigation.
- Civil Litigation: personal injury, auto accidents, wrongful death, appellate law, breach of contract.
- Appellate Law: civil and criminal appeals at the California Court of Appeal; writs of mandate.

## Service Area
San Luis Obispo County: San Luis Obispo (primary office), Paso Robles, Arroyo Grande, Atascadero, Morro Bay, and surrounding communities.

## Key Brand Messages
- "Most everyone needs a trust."
- "We've litigated poorly written estate plans."
- Litigators who draft transactional documents
- Central Coast natives
- Transparent, flat-fee estate planning with payment plans available
- Free consultations; same-week appointments often available
- 30+ years combined experience
